summary: Iteration 38: Comprehensive testing of appointment creation bug fix. All backend API tests passed (12/12). Frontend tests verified: 'Cliente Occasionale' button works correctly, appointment creation succeeds on working days, closed day warnings display properly for Sunday/Monday with disabled save button.
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (12/12 passed) ===
1. test_login_returns_access_token - PASS: Login returns 'access_token' field correctly
2. test_create_appointment_with_cliente_occasionale - PASS: client_id='generic' for 'Cliente Occasionale'
3. test_create_appointment_with_cliente_generico - PASS: client_id='generic' for 'Cliente Generico'
4. test_create_appointment_with_new_named_client - PASS: Creates new client in DB for named clients
5. test_create_appointment_with_existing_client_id - PASS: Uses existing client correctly
6. test_create_appointment_error_no_client - PASS: Returns 400 when no client specified
7. test_create_appointment_invalid_date_format - PASS: Returns 422 for invalid date format
8. test_create_appointment_with_null_promo_and_card - PASS: Handles null promo_id/card_id
9. test_get_appointments_by_date - PASS: GET /api/appointments?date=YYYY-MM-DD works
10. test_cors_allows_all_origins - PASS: CORS OPTIONS request succeeds
11. test_get_services - PASS: GET /api/services returns list
12. test_get_operators - PASS: GET /api/operators returns list
=== FRONTEND TESTS ===
1. Login flow - PASS: Admin login works correctly
2. Planning page navigation - PASS: Planning page loads with calendar
3. New Appointment Dialog - PASS: Opens via 'Nuovo' button
4. Occasionale button - PASS: Pre-fills name with 'Cliente Occasionale'
5. Service selection - PASS: Accordion categories expand, services selectable
6. Date selection - PASS: Date input works correctly
7. Working day (Tuesday 2026-04-07) - PASS: No warning, save enabled
8. Appointment creation - PASS: Toast 'Appuntamento creato!' appears
9. Closed day Sunday (2026-04-05) - PASS: Warning 'Domenica e giorno di chiusura!'
10. Closed day Monday (2026-04-06) - PASS: Warning 'Lunedi e giorno di chiusura!'
11. Save button disabled on closed days - PASS: Shows 'Giorno chiuso' text
critical_code_review_comments: Backend appointments.py: Correctly handles 'Cliente Occasionale' and 'Cliente Generico' by setting client_id='generic' (lines 73-84)
Backend server.py: CORS configured with allow_origins=['*'] when CORS_ORIGINS env is empty (lines 72-76)
Frontend NewAppointmentDialog.jsx: Explicit payload construction with all fields (lines 224-238)
Frontend NewAppointmentDialog.jsx: Good error handling with console logging (lines 252-258)
Frontend NewAppointmentDialog.jsx: Proper closed day detection and save button disabling (lines 138-148, 707)
seed_data_creation: Created test appointments during backend tests (cleaned up after each test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 verified the appointment creation bug fix. Key fixes working: 1) CORS allows all origins. 2) 'Cliente Occasionale' and 'Cliente Generico' both set client_id='generic' (no duplicate client creation). 3) Frontend payload construction is explicit with all fields. 4) Closed days (Sunday/Monday) show warning and disable save button. 5) Working days allow appointment creation successfully.

cliente_occasionale_fix.details: Backend treats 'Cliente Occasionale' same as 'Cliente Generico' - sets client_id='generic' instead of creating duplicate client

cors_configuration.details: CORS allows all origins when CORS_ORIGINS env is empty or set to '*'

frontend_payload.details: Explicit payload construction with client_id, client_name, client_phone, service_ids, operator_id, date, time, notes, promo_id, card_id

closed_day_warning.details: Sunday shows 'Domenica e giorno di chiusura!', Monday shows 'Lunedi e giorno di chiusura!', save button disabled with 'Giorno chiuso' text

appointment_creation.details: Full flow works: select Occasionale -> select service -> set working day date -> save -> success toast
